text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um, Ayabe? Could we ask you to come<n>along on
our upcoming stargazing<n>session?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
For our independent research<n>assignment, we
made our theme "reach<n>for the stars" and decided
to try some<n>amateur astronomy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Surely you can find someone more<n>suitable than
me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, Curren told us, "Ayabe knows<n>more about
stars than anyone else at this<n>school!" So
obviously you're the real<n>deal!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wish she would stop that... Look, it's<n>just such
short notice.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I'm sorry! We're so inconsiderate...<n>All we
could think about was how fun<n>it'd be. Of course
you can't...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I meant... I need to hurry and plan.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want to hear any<n>complaining. And
don't make a racket<n>out there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, okay! We'll make sure not to<n>bother the
neighborhood!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Good. I'll let you know when I figure<n>out what
day's clear enough for it.
